'''zhashasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeer|zeer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeer|zeer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhashasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæshæshæth|zhæshæshæth]] || [[word:zhæshæshæj|zhæshæshæj]] || [[word:zhæshæshæsh|zhæshæshæsh]] || [[word:zhæshæshæ|zhæshæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashashashath|zhashashashath]] || [[word:zhashashashaj|zhashashashaj]] || [[word:zhashashashash|zhashashashash]] || [[word:zhashashasha|zhashashasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashashath|zhashashath]] || [[word:zhashashaj|zhashashaj]] || [[word:zhashashash|zhashashash]] || [[word:zhashasha|zhashasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashafshath|zhashafshath]] || [[word:zhashafshaj|zhashafshaj]] || [[word:zhashafshash|zhashafshash]] || [[word:zhashafshaf|zhashafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhashashatha|zhashashatha]] || [[word:zhashashaja|zhashashaja]] || [[word:zhashashasha|zhashashasha]] || [[word:zhashashaka|zhashashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhashashath|zhashashath]] || [[word:zhashashaj|zhashashaj]] || [[word:zhashashash|zhashashash]] || [[word:zhashasha|zhashasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhashashathal|zhashashathal]] || [[word:zhashashajal|zhashashajal]] || [[word:zhashashashal|zhashashashal]] || [[word:zhashashakal|zhashashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhashashathatha|zhashashathatha]] || [[word:zhashashajaja|zhashashajaja]] || [[word:zhashashashasha|zhashashashasha]] || [[word:zhashashaka|zhashashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhashashathan|zhashashathan]] || [[word:zhashashajan|zhashashajan]] || [[word:zhashashashan|zhashashashan]] || [[word:zhashashakan|zhashashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhashashathaoro|zhashashathaoro]] || [[word:zhashashajaoro|zhashashajaoro]] || [[word:zhashashashaoro|zhashashashaoro]] || [[word:zhashashakaoro|zhashashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
